features.title: Powerful
features.subtitle: Everything you need to automate your greenhouse operations with precision and intelligence.

analytics.title: Real-time Analytics
analytics.description: Monitor all IoT sensors with live data streaming. Temperature, humidity, soil moisture, and CO₂ levels at your fingertips.

climate.title: AI Climate Control
climate.description: Intelligent algorithms automatically maintain optimal growing conditions. Let AgroAi handle the complexity.

remote.title: Remote Management
remote.description: Control pumps, lights, and fans from anywhere. Full device management via MQTT and WebSocket protocols.

multi.title: Multi-Greenhouse
multi.description: Manage unlimited greenhouses from a single dashboard. Switch between facilities instantly.

auth.signInTo: Sign in to your AgroAi account
auth.loginError: Login failed. Please check your credentials.
auth.registerSuccess: Welcome to AgroAi! Your account has been created.
auth.passwordResetUnavailable: Password reset is not enabled on the backend yet. Use demo login or ask an administrator to update the password.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your account information and security settings

dashboard.title: Your
dashboard.subtitle: Manage and monitor all your connected greenhouses
dashboard.createDescription: Create a new greenhouse to start monitoring
dashboard.emptyDescription: Add your first greenhouse, then manage sensors, devices, plants, and AI chat from one place.

aiMode.manualDescription: You have full control over all devices
aiMode.optimizing: AI is actively optimizing your greenhouse environment...

settings.title: Greenhouse
settings.subtitle: Configure thresholds and automation parameters
settings.saveHint: Review the name and sensor thresholds, then save your changes.
settings.invalidThresholds: Max value must be greater than min value for every sensor.

assistant.title: AI
assistant.subtitle: Ask questions about your greenhouse or send control requests in natural language.
assistant.chatDescription: The assistant can read greenhouse data and trigger safe greenhouse and plant actions.
assistant.welcome: I am ready to help with greenhouse monitoring, AI mode, devices, and plant management.
assistant.placeholder: Ask about greenhouse status, telemetry trends, or request a safe action...
assistant.footer: Use this global chat for all greenhouses, or open AI Chat inside one greenhouse for focused answers.
assistant.scopedSubtitle: Ask about this greenhouse without repeating its id.
assistant.scopedWelcome: I am focused on {{name}}. Ask about its status, devices, telemetry, plants, or safe control actions.
assistant.scopedFooter: This chat is scoped to the current greenhouse; no greenhouse id is needed.

common.appErrorDescription: The interface hit an unexpected error. Reload the page to recover.
